description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained grassy yard and several mature trees. The front facade features a small covered porch with white railings, a central door, and two large windows, one on each side of the entrance. A red car is parked on a driveway to the right, next to a mailbox and utility box, indicating a suburban or residential neighborhood setting. The rear of the bungalow has a simple, unadorned wall with a single window and a stone path leading to the back door. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The landscaping includes a mix of shrubs and garden furniture, enhancing the home's inviting and lived-in appearance.
description: A single-story gray bungalow with a dark gable roof, front porch, and surrounding yard with trees and a driveway. Features include large windows, a red car, and garden elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, central door, two large windows, driveway with a red car, mailbox, and lush trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, dense tree coverage, and the red car partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple wall, single window, stone path, and garden furniture, framed by trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain gable end, green foundation, and more trees, with the car and driveway visible on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
